debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mR : MeasurableSpace R
inst✝⁶ : Nonempty α
inst✝⁵ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁴ : DecidableEq α
inst✝³ : Countable α
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace R
inst✝¹ : Nonempty R
alg : Algorithm α R
ν : Kernel α R
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω => ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun x => @Bandits.ArrayModel.hist α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg x n)
    (@Bandits.ArrayModel.arrayMeasure α R mα mR ν)

  have h2 : Measurable (hist alg · n) := measurable_hist alg n
  -- The key is that hist at time n only depends on ω.1 at indices ≤ n
  -- and ω.1 (n+1) is independent from those in the infinite product measure

  have : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2)) 
      (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    unfold arrayMeasure
    refine IndepFun.symm ?_

        (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) := by
      exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) (X := fun i u ↦ u) (fun _ ↦ measurable_id)).indepFun_restrict_compl 
        (Iic n) (n + 1) (by simp)
    refine indepFun_prod (X := fun ω ↦ ω (n + 1)) (Y := fun ω ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω i, ω)) 
        (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) |>.comp ?_ measurable_id
    exact h_ind.prod_mk_right (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  exact this.comp h2 measurable_id

have h1 : Measurable (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) := by fun_prop
  have h2 : Measurable (hist alg · n) := measurable_hist alg n
  -- hist alg ω n depends only on ω.1 0, ..., ω.1 n and ω.2
  -- We need to show ω.1 (n+1) is independent of these
  have key : IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω i)) volume :=
    indepFun_eval_Iic_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) n
  refine IndepFun.of_comp_left ?_ (fun ω ↦ ((fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i), ω.2)) h1 ?_
  · -- Show the second function factors through ((fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i), ω.2)
    refine ⟨fun p ↦ hist alg ⟨fun k ↦ if hk : k ≤ n then p.1 ⟨k, hk⟩ else default, p.2⟩ n, ?_, ?_⟩
    · fun_prop
    · ext ω
      congr 1
      ext k
      simp only [Subtype.coe_prop, ↓reduceDIte]
  · -- Show (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) is independent of ((fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i), ω.2)
    have h3 : IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1)) (fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω i)
        (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) := indepFun_eval_Iic_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) n
    exact indepFun_prod_mk_of_indepFun h3 (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

refine IndepFun.comp ?_ (by fun_prop) (measurable_hist alg n)
  unfold arrayMeasure
  refine IndepFun.prod_mk_right ?_ _ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  have hindep := iIndepFun_infinitePi (P := fun (_ : ℕ) ↦ (volume : Measure I)) 
    (Ω := fun _ ↦ I) (X := fun i u ↦ u) (fun i ↦ measurable_id)
  exact hindep.indepFun_Iic (i := n + 1) (n := n) (Nat.lt_succ_self n)

refine indepFun_of_indepFun_fst ?_ (by fun_prop) (measurable_hist alg n) ?_
  · exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi (P := fun _ ↦ (volume : Measure I)) (X := fun _ u ↦ u)
      (fun _ ↦ measurable_id)).indepFun_Iic_succ n
  · intro ω i
    induction n with
    | zero => simp [hist_zero]
    | succ m ih =>
      rw [hist_add_one]
      split_ifs with him
      · exact ih (fun j ↦ ω j) ⟨i, Nat.lt_succ_of_le him⟩
      · simp only [ih, algFunction]
        rfl

refine indepFun_of_indepFun_prod ?_ ?_ (by fun_prop) (measurable_hist alg n)

induction n with
  | zero =>
    simp only [hist_zero]
    have h : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 1) 
        (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 0, ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      unfold arrayMeasure
      exact (indepFun_eval_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ (volume : Measure I)) 1 0 (by omega)).prod_mk_right 
        (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
    exact h.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop)
  | succ n ih =>
    have h : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 2)) 
        (fun ω ↦ ((fun i : Iic (n + 1) ↦ ω.1 i), ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      unfold arrayMeasure
      refine IndepFun.prod_mk_right ?_ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
      exact (indepFun_eval_restrict_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) (n + 2) (Set.Iic (n + 1)) 
        (by simp; omega)).comp_left Prod.fst (by fun_prop)
    exact h.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop)

have h1 : IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → I ↦ ω (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω i))
      (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) :=
    indepFun_eval_restrict_infinitePi (μ := fun _ ↦ volume) (n + 1) n (by omega)
  have h2 : IndepFun Prod.fst Prod.snd (arrayMeasure ν) := indepFun_fst_snd ν
  have h3 : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i)) Prod.snd
      (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    refine IndepFun.comp h2 ?_ measurable_id
    exact Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)
  have h4 : IndepFun (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ ω.1 (n + 1))
      (fun ω ↦ ((fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i), ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    have := h3.comp (φ := Prod.fst) (ψ := fun x ↦ (Prod.snd (Prod.fst x), Prod.snd x))
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
    convert (h1.prod_right h2).comp (φ := fun ω ↦ (ω.1, ω.2)) (ψ := id) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
      using 2 <;> ext <;> simp
  exact h4.comp measurable_id (measurable_hist alg n)
sorry

    (measurable_hist alg n |>.comp (measurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun i ↦ by fun_prop)).prodMk measurable_snd)
